calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Gaetani Real Estate, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness Justin Sisco was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendants Marisa Beers and Chris Dillon.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 339 Lyon St., #1, San Francisco, CA. 94117.
Lease agreement is forfeited.
Back due rent and damages in total of $1,955.00
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Gaetani Real Estate, Inc. is present. Represented by Paul Gaetani.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Marisea Beers and Chris Dillon are not present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of June -18-2012 remains on calendar. (D501)
